--- hardware -----------------------------------------------

hw.perflevel0.physicalcpu           5
hw.perflevel1.physicalcpu           10
hw.nperflevels                      2
hw.tbfrequency                      24000000
kern.clockrate                      { hz = 100, tick = 10000, tickadj = 0, profhz = 100, stathz = 100 }
